LightningComponentBundle.description: A consolidated, efficient navigation component for Salesforce Experience Cloud. Replaces multiple fragmented components with a single, performant solution.

property.name: menuName
property.label: Navigation Menu Name
property.description: The name of the Navigation Menu Linkset configured in Experience Builder Settings > Navigation

property.name: logoType
property.label: Logo Type
property.description: Select the logo variant to display (customer/default=Voicebrook, agent)

property.name: includeHome
property.label: Include Home Link
property.description: Whether to show HOME in the navigation (Note: HOME is always shown regardless of this setting)
